rawContent: {"stage":"build","insights":[{"kind":"gotcha","text":"csrf-token route intentionally bypasses withAuth — CSRF tokens must be obtainable without prior auth","scope":"src/app/api/csrf-token/route.ts"},{"kind":"convention","text":"withAuth wraps route handlers, options like { roles: ['admin'] } handle RBAC — avoid redundant inline role checks","scope":"auth"},{"kind":"lesson","text":"Before adding withAuth everywhere, audit which routes intentionally need no auth (CSRF, health, etc.)","scope":"auth"}]}
